mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.project_key, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at, COUNT(d.id) FILTER (WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL) AS document_count FROM knowledge_project p LEFT JOIN rag_document d ON d.project_key = p.project_key
mapper.select: GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_project (project_key, name, description) VALUES (#{projectKey}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_project p WHERE p.project_key = #{projectKey} AND p.project_key <> 'default' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rag_document d WHERE d.project_key = p.project_key )
